commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the king said to Doeg, Turn you, and fall upon the priests. And Doeg the Edomite turned, and he fell upon the priests, and slew on that day fourscore and five persons that did wear a linen ephod. Josephus read "385. "Septuagint, "305. They all appeared in this dress, as they were priests. (Calmet) It was different from the sacred ephod. (Abulensis) Thus the posterity of Heli was almost entirely cut off, as God had threatened, chap. (Du Hamel; Tirinus).
